prompt: CI pipeline fails 20% of the time due to flaky E2E Playwright tests. Pass locally, fail intermittently in CI. Timing and database state issues.

assertions.text: Addresses database isolation between test runs
Recommends replacing arbitrary waits with explicit waitFor patterns
Suggests test retry configuration as a diagnostic (not a fix)
Addresses CI vs local environment differences
Provides a systematic diagnosis approach (not just a list of tips)
